Comment: Least-privilege policy for the Relay KNOWLEDGE-BASE READER component — Module 10, skill 3.2.1. This is the read-only retrieval identity used to query the relay-kb Knowledge Base (Retrieve / RetrieveAndGenerate) and the Cohere reranker the answer path uses. It can ONLY retrieve from relay-kb and read the docs/ corpus it is built on — it cannot write the index, change the KB, or touch the agent's tables. Separating it from the agent role lets a read-only reporting/eval caller query the KB without the agent's table write grants. ${ACCOUNT_ID}/${REGION} substituted by setup.py from STS.
